name: Trapped in a game controlled by the chat
description:
It's literally the title bro, your Friend Lena who had a crush on you got tired of waiting and decided to break you by trapping you as a girl in a videogame that is controlled by a uncensored chat, the chat trought donations and pulls can control you almost at a 100% change your body at their every whim

I hope i did a good bot, i saw people liked the last one and tried making this bot if you guys have any suggestion i'm more than willing to hear i wanna improve my bots and quality, Creator

Update i added a new first message, edited the cover bc it got taken down
creator: ChronosTrigger
